entries.title: honey
entries.description: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) — three reflexive levers that cut agent token cost: less code (YAGNI/stdlib-first), less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (ESON/compact-JSON). Plus on-demand satellites (review, eco, gain, compress) and a hive of read-only subagents that return compressed handoffs. Auto-intensity lite/full/ultra; correctness and safety-critical paths stay exact.

entries.title: devant
entries.description: A single-command, intent-aware coding companion. Onboards by scanning the repo with codegraph, captures the project's vision/direction/non-goals/rules as a local intent graph you own, and works like a teammate who knows what to do and what NOT to do. Lean, fast, ceremony scaled to blast radius. Everything it stores stays local and is never committed.

entries.title: sidecar
entries.description: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entries.title: tiered-development
entries.description: Three-tier model delegation for Claude Code: the Opus coordinator brainstorms a rough plan with you, Fable refines it and does the final deep review, fresh Opus builders write substantive code, and Sonnet handles mechanical edits, research, and per-step verification — a fresh agent per task so each gets a clean, focused context. Ships six agents, a gated coordination skill, and two helper workflows (design-panel, execute-wave) the skill calls.

Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entries.title: e2e-skills
entries.description: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/.

entries.title: doc-mirror
entries.description: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entries.description: Multi-account, token-efficient MCP for Outlook mail + Calendar + OneDrive via Microsoft Graph. 33 tools, Keychain-backed tokens.

entries.title: braynee
entries.description: Braynee turns Claude Code into your second brain — setup wizard, PARA vault scaffolding, company knowledge base, project detection, all-time usage insights, and daily workflow skills. Requires Claude Code ≥ 2.1.85 (hooks use the `if` field for tool/argument scoping).

entries.title: scr
entries.description: LLM-augmented local-diff reviewer. /scr:review opens an interactive side-by-side viewer with fold annotations, semantic-group sidebar, and round-trips inline comments back into the session.

entries.title: chronicle
entries.description: Lossless recorder for Claude Code sessions — raw JSONL + markdown + SQLite/FTS, captured by an external daemon with an in-session health watchdog.

entries.title: framedash
entries.description: Analyze your game telemetry with Claude Code. Bundles the Framedash MCP server (read-only analytics tools), a SQL query cookbook over the events schema, CLI usage patterns, and perf-diff CI recipes.

entries.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entries.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entries.title: ripple
entries.description: Agent video editing: transcription-driven cuts, frame-sheet eyes, HDR-safe finishing, deterministic QA, and a persistent taste memory (VIDEO.md). Routes motion graphics to HyperFrames or Remotion.

entries.title: clickup
entries.description: ClickUp CLI with 31 agent skills covering the full API -- token-efficient alternative to MCP with chat, time tracking, docs, and project management workflows

entries.title: ironlabs
entries.description: AI video production skills — creative direction, generation, editing, and e-commerce content

entries.description: AI Agent Skills

entries.title: rebeca-elmudesi
entries.description: Claude Code plugin for Rebeca Elmudesi — branded presentations and documents about her art via stromy-format, plus self-service website and brand asset editing via asset-broker

entries.title: biz
entries.description: Bootstrapped SaaS CEO companion — brings the scar tissue, frameworks, and push-back of a repeat founder to every business decision. Keeps you honest about numbers, ruthless about scope, and focused on shipping.

entries.title: ladder
entries.description: Personal growth companion — turns intentions into externally-bound commitments, tracks progress with honest data, and refuses to let rationalizations go unchallenged. Calibrated to your personality via the Enneagram.

entries.title: apartment-finder
entries.description: Multi-agent apartment search: a main-context orchestrator fans out parallel profiler subagents that score listings against a weighted preference profile, with a deterministic floor for acoustics/HVAC, geo-noise, flood risk, and cost.

entries.title: fno
entries.description: Set a target. Say f[no] to mostly done.

entries.title: rn-dev-agent
entries.description: AI agent that fully tests React Native features on simulator/emulator — navigates the app, verifies UI, walks user flows, and confirms internal state.

entries.title: keel
entries.description: Keel — an AI fractional-CTO advisor for product builders who don't have a senior technical voice in the room. Eight skills across the founder journey: first-build-scope, feature-decision, tech-evaluation, architecture-review, deep-review (repo-aware four-lens flagship), enterprise-ready, estimate-check, investor-dd-prep — plus a per-project decision ledger (.keel/) that remembers decisions, assumptions, and revisit-triggers across sessions. Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entries.title: astria
entries.description: Generate images and video, manage references (tunes) and packs, and write prompts with the Astria API. Bundles the `astria` CLI so no environment variables are needed — run `astria login` once.

entries.title: windbg-mcp
entries.description: WinDbg/DbgEng debugging: crash dumps, live user-mode and kernel, and Time Travel Debugging (TTD) — MCP server plus a skill that drives it.

entries.title: boca-plugin
entries.description: Ferramentas criadas para usar no Claude Code

entries.title: wikify
entries.description: Turn a folder of documents into a navigable, evidence-grounded wiki, with corpus and wiki MCP search tools.

entries.title: network-ai
entries.description: Gives Claude Code a multi-agent coordination layer over MCP — an atomic shared blackboard (locked propose/validate/commit), permission gating with HMAC/Ed25519-signed tokens, federated token-budget tracking, and append-only audit-log queries. Backed by an orchestrator with 32 framework adapters (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Gemini, and more).

entries.title: typescript-ui
entries.description: TypeScript 6 UI engineering team. Designs, reviews, optimizes, and improves UI code so it looks like a human design team built it — distinctive aesthetic point-of-view, OKLCH color systems, variable typography, motion with spring physics, sub-2.5s LCP, sub-200ms INP, sub-0.1 CLS, and TS6 strict-mode type safety with branded primitives, discriminated unions, and exhaustiveness. Six specialists (design architect, design reviewer, performance engineer, TypeScript engineer, anti-AI auditor, team lead), running on the session model, backed by self-contained references on TS6, Tailwind v4 + OKLCH + APCA, anti-AI-aesthetic patterns, Core Web Vitals, WCAG 2.2 + reduced motion, and component architecture (compound, polymorphic, slot). Four user-invoked skills: typescript-design-ui, typescript-review-ui, typescript-optimize-ui, typescript-improve-ui. Read-only by default; the orchestrator applies findings only on explicit user approval.

entries.title: ospec-workflow
entries.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow for VS Code Agent Customization with OpenSpec, strict TDD, phase agents, skills, hooks, and verification contracts.

entries.title: pve-bindsnap
entries.description: Snapshot and clone Proxmox LXC containers that have bind/device mounts. Ships the proxmox-bindsnap skill: install, verify, configure (BINDSNAP- markers, checksum guard) and operate pve-bindsnap.

entries.title: bitwize-music
entries.description: AI music generation workflow for Suno - album concepts, lyrics, prompts, mastering, release

entries.title: loupe
entries.description: Full-text code search skill for Claude Code — substring and regex across UTF-8/Shift_JIS/EUC-JP files. Uses MCP tools when available, falls back to loupe CLI.

entries.description: Stack-chan physical event channel for Claude Code — touch tap / stroke notifications from the desktop robot delivered as Channels messages.

entries.title: agent-reachout
entries.description: Multi-provider notification plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: sombra
entries.description: Living documentation and research workflows powered by Sombra

entries.title: apple-ui-craft
entries.description: Principal-engineer-grade Apple UI craft for iOS 26. Seven agents, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude), that design, review, optimize, and craft SwiftUI so it feels like Apple built it -- Liquid Glass, spring animation, intentional haptics, accessibility from birth, SwiftUI performance, and deep platform + cross-platform integration (widgets, Live Activities, App Intents, Apple Intelligence, WebView, watchOS/tvOS/visionOS/CarPlay). Six skills: design-ios (greenfield screen/flow creation), review-ios-ui (HIG + visual + interaction audit), optimize-ios-ui (animation + haptics + performance tuning), craft-ios-ui (full 5-specialist team sweep), audit-accessibility (deep a11y audit), integrate-platform (system-integration audit). Backed by a self-contained reference library across 12 domains (see ARCHITECTURE.md) distilled from an 88-document iOS vault (~103,000 lines), a Context7-verified version-floor registry, GoodMem learnings, and serena navigation. Under ultracode the session model conducts, and Sonnet-5-xhigh executor teams run the scoped grunt stages. Read-only review by default; findings apply only on explicit user approval.

entries.title: open-second-brain
entries.description: Plugin-first second brain package for AI agents and humans.

entries.title: y2
entries.description: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entries.title: overcast
entries.description: Give any agent senses (video/audio/image understanding) and OSINT reach (search/capture/monitor), organized around an investigation case. Built on pi with the tinycloud/Cloudglue perception backend.

entries.title: typescript-refactor
entries.description: JavaScript-to-TypeScript refactor planning specialist, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude). Dispatches a full team of 7 read-only senior planner agents in sequential waves (inventory, target architecture, migration slicing, verification) to produce an evidence-tagged phased migration plan, scrum-master-format per-story markdown files, Mermaid dependency DAG, and dispatch wave plan. Grounded in embedded TypeScript reference files covering strict mode, modules, build tooling, testing, monorepos, security, and migration doctrine. Cutting-edge TS practices: strict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes, verbatimModuleSyntax, erasable-syntax-only, Zod at boundaries, branded types, Drizzle/Prisma, Fastify/Hono, Vitest, pnpm + turborepo, type-coverage CI gates.

entries.title: spec-driven-jp
entries.description: Hybrid pipeline for spec-driven development with Japanese design documents + Figma. Wraps GitHub Spec Kit with design-intake, code-reviewer, security-reviewer, and glossary-steward agents.

entries.title: t3
entries.description: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entries.title: autumn
entries.description: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entries.title: claude-code-stack
entries.description: Orchestration stack: foreman + subagents, session/handoff skills, cost & brevity guardrails, and design/data toolchains. Skills are gated at runtime by .claude/stack-config.json.

entries.title: theorems-harness-product
entries.description: Agent delivery surface for Theorems Harness capabilities, hooks, and MCP facade.

entries.title: jk
entries.description: GitHub CLI-style interface for Jenkins controllers - create multibranch jobs, inspect config.xml, and manage runs, logs, artifacts, credentials, nodes, and queues

entries.title: claude-mem-lite
entries.description: Persistent long-term memory for Claude Code via MCP — captures coding decisions, bugfixes, and context across sessions. Hybrid FTS5 + TF-IDF search with episode batching. Single SQLite DB, no external services. A lighter, lower-cost alternative to claude-mem (episode batching + a smaller model; cost savings are an internal estimate, not a measured benchmark).

entries.title: axhub
entries.description: Korean-first Claude Code plugin for axhub. onboarding/bootstrap/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update 8개 스킬이 ax-hub-cli v0.20.0+ 표면(hidden plugin-support 그룹 + 공개 deploy verify·diagnose·update)을 직접 호출해요. update 는 사전 안내 문장 없이 `현재 버전을 확인할게요.` 로 바로 시작해요. import 는 기존 로컬 앱 가져오기를, diagnosis 는 배포 실패 원인 요약을 담당하고, preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 제공해요.

entries.title: piflow
entries.description: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entries.title: ai-config
entries.description: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entries.title: redteam
entries.description: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entries.title: provenship
entries.description: End-to-end development pipeline: brainstorm -> plan -> build (TDD, subagents) -> review -> browser QA (UI + API) -> evidence-rich finalize -> ship. Hand it a requirement, get back a PR with proof.

entries.title: harness-claude
entries.description: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entries.title: sos-memory
entries.description: Durable cross-agent memory toolkit for Claude, Codex, Gemini, QMD, vault project pages, daily notes, decisions, and continues handoffs.

entries.title: agent-codebase-skills
entries.description: Layered memory for AI agents in long-lived codebases: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md conventions, auto session notes, concurrent-safe task management

entries.title: orchestra
entries.description: Governance-first specialist skill framework for routed, auditable AI coding workflows.

entries.title: kratos
entries.description: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entries.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entries.description: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entries.title: stromy
entries.description: Claude Code plugin for Stromy branded deliverables — composes nl-gov-data intel/analysis + stromy-format rendering + markdown-canvas deliverable planning over Stromy's brand

entries.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,852 supported skills.

entries.title: starter-kit-essentials
entries.description: Le noyau du starter kit : 6 skills génériques développeur (revue de code à divulgation progressive, stratégie de test, vérification, débogage systématique, discipline d'agent, qualité de commit) + les 4 subagents à mémoire de projet.
